blocks.text: DTC P0780: Hydraulic control system failure
This DTC is stored when a DTC related to a hydraulic control system error is detected; the PGM-FI ECU simultaneously stores the DTC when it detects either DTC P1898 or P1899.
Detection frequency, detection sequence, detection time required, detection method type, OBD status
Refer to the appropriate DTC commentary. (P1898, P1899)
When either DTC P1898 or P1899 is detected.
Refer to the appropriate DTC commentary. (P1898, P1899)
Refer to the appropriate DTC commentary. (P1898, P1899)

If the vehicle is determined to have a fault, a temporary DTC is stored in the PGM-FI ECU memory. If the same failure is detected at the next D/C (two consecutive detections), the D indicator light will flash without the PGM-FI warning light illuminating, and the DTC and freeze data will be stored.
Use of the clear command of the scan tool (including HDS) or removal of the 12V battery terminal will clear the D indicator light, temporary DTC, DTC, and freeze data.
